channel.title: ShuoShuo on Liu Qiran
channel.description: Recent content in ShuoShuo on Liu Qiran

item.title: Re-update
item.description:
It’s been a long time since I’ve maintained my website. I’m planning to update it again in the next few days.

Recently, I’ve given up on the idea of offline writing. I’ve started trying to write articles online, which is more convenient for saving.
item.content:encoded:
Machine translation notice: This page is machine-translated and may contain inaccuracies. If it reads awkwardly, your corrections in the comments would be much appreciated. View original

It’s been a long time since I’ve maintained my website. I’m planning to update it again in the next few days.

Recently, I’ve given up on the idea of offline writing. I’ve started trying to write articles online, which is more convenient for saving.
